Oracle Events
Search Slack, Linear, or Airtable for the DOT hazmat audit panic (query: "DOT" or "hazmat" or "audit" or "laser cutter" or "certificate"). The agent needs to discover that the employee associated with the laser cutter move is Keiko Tanaka and the coordinator who forgot to file the certificate is Blessing.
Search Slack or email for Catalina's reply-all leak of the internal pricing model (query: "Catalina" or "reply-all" or "pricing" or "discount" or "Terraform"). The agent needs to discover that the client contact who saw the leaked email is Rachel Nguyen.
Search Slack, Airtable, or Email for the TechComfort Supply identical receipt fraud (query: "stipend" or "fraud" or "TechComfort Supply" or "identical receipt"). The agent needs to discover that the two employees who submitted the identical receipts are Kevin Tran and Andre Washington.
Search QuickBooks, Slack, or Airtable for the Heartland Movers Q1 overbilling issue (query: "Heartland Movers" or "Q1" or "overbilling" or "invoice"). The agent needs to discover that the overbilled amount is $4,800 ($12,800 billed minus $8,000 actual).
Search Slack, Airtable, or Email for the Noah Fitzpatrick itinerary mixup (query: "Noah Fitzpatrick" or "itinerary" or "Fatimah" or "GreenStack"). The agent needs to discover that Fatimah mistakenly sent Noah Fitzgerald's (GreenStack) confirmed itinerary to Noah Fitzpatrick (Axiom).
Look up Marcus Thorne's contact information using the directory/contacts tool (query: "Marcus Thorne").
Send a message to Marcus Thorne (via Slack DM, or fallback channels #operations/#general if DMs fail) asking if the DOT extension was granted.
Look up Priya Chakrabarti's contact information using the directory/contacts tool (query: "Priya Chakrabarti").
Send a message to Priya Chakrabarti (via Slack or email) containing the full breakdown of the five requested findings (Keiko Tanaka/Blessing, Rachel Nguyen, Kevin Tran/Andre Washington, the $4,800 overbilling amount, and Noah Fitzgerald's itinerary).
